homeSection.title: Rock Climbing
homeSection.description1: Join our outdoor rock climbing training sessions in the scenic Gonio-Kvariati area. Suitable for both beginners and experienced climbers.
homeSection.description2: Training takes place four times a week: on Saturday and Sunday at 10:00 and 15:00. We provide all necessary equipment, including climbing shoes. Price: 49 GEL.

location.howToGet: You can get there by your own car, taxi, minibus, or bus №16.
location.reviewPrompt: Write a review about your rock climbing training:

list.li1: We use only high-quality equipment from world-renowned and reliable brands.
list.li2: All equipment is regularly inspected and updated.
list.li3: We fully provide all the necessary gear for a comfortable and safe training session.

details.li1: Dynamic rope — breaking strength 22 kN (2200 kg).
details.li2: Helmet — withstands a direct vertical impact of 50 J.
details.li3: Harness — secured on the body at three points and suitable for people up to 150 kg.
details.li4: Belay station — consists of two anchor points and is reinforced with two opposing carabiners.
details.li5: Chalk — absorbs moisture and improves grip on the rock.
details.li6: Climbing shoes — for better traction on the rock.

accessibility.title: POINT 2 (ACCESSIBILITY)
accessibility.description: We conduct a safety briefing before every training session. For beginners, we clearly explain what should not be done. Top-rope belaying is used, and on difficult sections the instructor provides assistance. The Gonio–Kvariati crag features routes of grades 5 and 6 that are suitable for beginners.

experience.title: POINT 3 (EXPERIENCE)
experience.description: Our team (Sasha and Egor) has extensive experience on this terrain and takes care of you throughout the entire training session.
